title: cymbachne angustata var. indica
intro: Cymbachne angustata var. indica, also known as Indian club moss or Cymachne, is a type of fern-like plant belonging to the family Restionaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cymbachne angustata var. indica include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Cymbachne angustata var. indica typically involve drying and processing the plant material to create infusions, decoctions, or tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
